title: Europe once again signals openness to dialogue with Putin
subhed: European countries seek to reopen a channel of communication with Russia, with France first among them, at a time when the US appears to be losing interest in the war in Ukraine.

Trump to attend new White House press gala after shooting
subhed: US President Donald Trump announced on Tuesday that he will speak at the White House correspondents dinner, which has been rescheduled for July 24. At this year's edition that was held in April, Trump had to be evacuated after shots erupted at a security checkpoint outside the ballroom venue.

title: Denmark's Mette Frederiksen secures third term as prime minister
subhed: After unusually lengthy negotiations, the leader of Denmark's Social Democrats has succeeded in forming a center-left coalition, bringing together four parties in a fragmented political landscape.

title: Les Nuits de Fourvière in Lyon unveils a vibrant program to celebrate the festival's 80th anniversary
subhed: Through July 25, the festival is presenting 60 open-air shows, concerts, performances and masked balls, including 'To See the Stars Again' by the Australian contemporary circus troupe Circa.

title: 'It's the Palme d'Or of French hospitality': The government unveils its updated list of the 33 most luxurious hotels in France
subhed: The new round of the government's 'Palaces de France' label was revealed on June 2, with six new additions and four removals. The initiative aims to showcase this flagship sector of French expertise, even though the owners of these establishments are rarely French.

Putin faces a series of setbacks, fueling discontent in Russia and raising doubts about his strategy
subhed: While the Russian president claims that victory in Ukraine is within reach, Kyiv is stepping up drone strikes deep inside Russian territory. These military setbacks compound the country's mounting economic difficulties.

title: French sociologist, philosopher and intellectual provocateur Edgar Morin has died aged 104
subhed: Committed to connecting different fields of knowledge to develop his 'complex thought,' this former member of the Resistance and deeply humanist intellectual advocated for a revolution of consciousness. He died in Paris on Friday, his wife confirmed to Le Monde.

title: Elon Musk, SpaceX and the illusion of wealth
subhed: The upcoming stock market listing of SpaceX values the company, of which the billionaire owns less than 50%, at nearly $2 trillion. This figure relies on the success of projects that are unrealistic within any reasonable financial timeframe, such as establishing a colony on Mars or building data centers in space.
